benefits.description: Initial strong response in Nov/Dec 2025 at 2.5-3mg, achieved weight loss results during cut

side_effects.description: After 20-day break and returning at 3mg dose, felt no effect. Bumped to 5mg with still minimal response - likely tachyphylaxis/resensitization shock

protocol_notes: Used Retatrutide Nov/Dec 2025 at 2.5-3mg with good initial results. Took 20-day break in Dec 2025/Jan 2026, restarted at 3mg with no effect, escalated to 5mg also ineffective. Concerned about losing previous weight loss results. OP recommended 12-14 day washout followed by slow retitration (2mg weeks 1-3, 3mg week 4, 4mg week 5).
